retrieved_result: Is a 401k a Defined Benefit Plan? When it comes to retirement plans, you could have a defined contribution or a defined benefit plan. If you have a 401k plan offer from your employer, this is not known as a defined benefit plan. Instead, you are actually using a defined contribution plan in which you and your employer put money into
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses retirement plans (401k) and defined benefit vs defined contribution, which is unrelated to debugging API integration.

history.title: Is a 401k a Defined Benefit Plan?
history.description: When it comes to retirement plans, you could have a defined contribution or a defined benefit plan. If you have a 401k plan offer from your employer, this is not known as a defined benefit plan. Instead, you are actually using a defined contribution plan in which you and your employer put money into
